impact: The repo now has the BAA register and AWS account baseline runbook, but production readiness still depends on filling real AWS staging/production account IDs, AWS BAA effective date, evidence path, IAM Identity Center state, and GitHub OIDC deploy role ARNs from the actual AWS account. T-039 can proceed with local IaC skeleton work, but production deployment must not treat these TODO evidence fields as complete.
title: AWS account IDs and BAA evidence still need real source values
